answers: Technical writing = creating clear documentation for technical products. User guides, API docs, tutorials, and reference manuals.
Tips: know your audience, use simple language, structure with headings, include examples, and test your instructions.
Good docs: clear, concise, well-organized, searchable, and up-to-date. Include code examples and troubleshooting sections.
Career: technical writers are in high demand. Salary $60-120K. Skills needed: writing, tech understanding, empathy for users.

Retrieved knowledge about technical writing:
1. [technical_writing] Q: technical writing basic
    A: Technical writing = creating clear documentation for technical products. User guide, API docs, tutorials, and reference manuals.
2. [documentation] Q: how to write good docs
    A: Write docs for future-you: you'll forget how your own code works in 6 months. Document decisions and why, not just what.
3. [writing] Q: how to write articles
    A: Writing tip: write every day, even if it's bad. Read a lot, edit ruthlessly, and remember - the first draft is never perfect. Just get words
